---
name: API coverage request
about: Request generated or curated coverage for a Metabase API area
labels: api-coverage
---

## Metabase API Area

Link to the relevant Metabase API docs or name the endpoint/operation.

## Desired MCP Surface

- Generic registry coverage
- Curated tool
- Resource or resource template
- Prompt

## Safety Tier

Expected tier: `read`, `safe-write`, `destructive`, or `admin`.

## Acceptance Criteria

What should an agent be able to do after this is implemented?
